OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

RST_THREAT_FEED_BASEURL.description: The base URL for the RST Cloud API.

RST_THREAT_FEED_CONTIMEOUT.description: Feed download connection timeout in seconds.

RST_THREAT_FEED_READTIMEOUT.description: Feed download read timeout in seconds.

RST_THREAT_FEED_INTERVAL.description: The interval in seconds between each run of the connector.

RST_THREAT_FEED_MAX_RETRIES.description: Retry count for connection issues when sending the STIX bundle to OpenCTI.

RST_THREAT_FEED_LATEST.description: The time range for retrieving data (1h, 4h, 12h, or day).

RST_THREAT_FEED_MIN_SCORE_IMPORT.description: Minimum score threshold for importing indicators.

RST_THREAT_FEED_MIN_SCORE_DETECTION_IP.description: Minimum score to set x_opencti_detection for IP indicators.

RST_THREAT_FEED_MIN_SCORE_DETECTION_DOMA.description: Minimum score to set x_opencti_detection for Domain indicators.

RST_THREAT_FEED_MIN_SCORE_DETECTION_URL.description: Minimum score to set x_opencti_detection for URL indicators.

RST_THREAT_FEED_MIN_SCORE_DETECTION_HASH.description: Minimum score to set x_opencti_detection for Hash indicators.

RST_THREAT_FEED_ONLY_NEW.description: Whether to import only new indicators.

RST_THREAT_FEED_ONLY_ATTRIBUTED.description: Whether to import only attributed indicators.

RST_THREAT_FEED_CREATE_MITRE_TTPS.description: Whether to create relationships between Indicators and MITRE ATT&CK TTPs. Warning: creates many relationships.

RST_THREAT_FEED_CREATE_CUSTOM_TTPS.description: Whether to create custom Attack-Pattern objects and relationships for named techniques not covered by MITRE.
